title: Blueprint Ledger Console
concept: A light technical two-column console that makes Blueprint search, URL running, JSON editing, replacement warnings, manager tools, save destinations, saved objects, transfers, and event history mutate one visible active Playground object.
flows: Search and filter a representative subset of the 43-entry Blueprint gallery, inspect selected detail, edit and validate blueprint.json, copy, download, and run the Blueprint against the current Playground with a replace-current warning and completed preview mutation.
Use command search to query grouped commands, select Run Blueprint URL, complete action progress, and visibly mutate shell title, path, preview state, transfer history, and event stream.
Finish a database operation end to end by selecting the SQLite-backed database, downloading database.sqlite with progress, success state, transfer history, and log/event record.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct consequences, progress, saved identity, saved-row mutation, and storage badge changes.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, delete confirmation, final row removal, and fallback to an unsaved active Playground.
Use Site Manager tabs for files, Blueprint, database, logs, settings, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, GitHub import, and ZIP import while keeping the live WordPress shell protected.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL input
Gutenberg PR or branch route with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with validation and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset label
Selected Blueprint detail and featured entries
Blueprint JSON editor with dirty and validation state
Blueprint copy, download, and run actions
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission, cancel, denial, and reload consequence
Save progress state
Saved, local-directory, and temporary Playground differences
Saved and unsaved Playground list
Open/manage saved rows
Rename saved Playground
Delete confirmation and active fallback state
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Storage badge and shell title mutation
WordPress/PHP/language settings
Include older WordPress versions
Allow network access
Create a multisite network
Destructive reset and stored Save & Reload consequences
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty marker, save, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, selected state, download progress, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with warning and event records
Export to GitHub
Download as .zip
Database download
Blueprint bundle actions
Transfer history for saves, GitHub, ZIP, database, Blueprint, import, export, rename, and delete
